subscriptionPoliciesSubtitle: Please read and accept to proceed to payment.
subscriptionPoliciesBody:
We’re happy to have you with us on your journey toward a healthier lifestyle. To ensure we provide the best service and highest possible quality, please read the following subscription terms and conditions and agree to them:

1. Packages & Meals:
Subscriptions include a variety of meal options (Fish, Meat, Chicken) based on the subscriber’s selection for portion size (100, 150, 200 grams) and the number of daily meals (from 1 up to 5 meals).
Meals are prepared daily to ensure quality. The subscriber must inform the restaurant management in advance of any food allergies before the subscription starts.

2. Delivery & Pickup Policy:
Displayed package prices do not include delivery fees.
Meal delivery is available to the address specified by the subscriber (within Jeddah) for an additional fee agreed upon and added to the subscription amount.
If the pickup/delivery address changes, customer service must be notified at least 24 hours before the scheduled pickup/delivery time.
If the customer does not receive the meal at the specified time and place for reasons attributable to them, the meal will be considered received and no compensation will be due.

3. Postponement Policy (Temporary Pause):
We understand circumstances may change, so we offer flexibility to postpone receiving meals according to your package, as follows:
- 7-day package: up to (1) day only.
- 26-day package: up to (4) days.
- 30-day package: up to (5) days.
Postponement mechanism: If postponement is required or extended beyond the allowed period, customer service must be notified.

4. Modification & Cancellation Policy:
The subscription cannot be canceled and the cash amount cannot be refunded after the package has been activated and the first meal has been received.

Subscriber acknowledgement:
I acknowledge that I have read all the subscription terms and conditions for “Basic Diet” packages, and accordingly I agree to comply with them.
subscriptionPoliciesAgreement: I have read and agree to the subscription terms and conditions.
